scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 180 Ringing [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: [$gsid] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 183 Session Progress [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: [$gsid] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: [$gsid] Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687638 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000
